title: Texas Instruments India International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Texas Instruments India International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Texas Instruments India International Enterprises in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Texas Instruments India International Enterprises:
Texas Instruments India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India International Enterprises!
